intent: Drives CLK_OUT low for all cycles, missing the required two passed high phases.
Preserves active-low reset but passes every non-reset CLK high phase instead of suppressing frame cycles 2..7.
passes only one cycle per frame

why_wrong: Preserves burst timing but scales CLK_OUT high level below the public logic-high threshold.
Treats the active-low reset as active-high and emits clocks while RST_N is low.
Restarts the frame after the two-cycle burst window instead of at cycle zero.
